source.description: Built-in image generation output extracted from the session log and saved as a raster master.
source.notes: The rejected v1 process study remains in drafts/cozy-teacup/ and should not be used as the public finished source.

process_strategy: Derive each process frame from the same saved v2 master. Reveal larger drawing decisions rather than isolated tiny marks: construction, cup/handle, saucer, tea/steam, heart/rim color, shading, then final keeper lines.

final_elements.name: cup rim oval
final_elements.description: The level oval that defines the cup opening.

final_elements.name: saucer guide oval
final_elements.description: The wide lower oval that anchors the cup.

final_elements.name: cup bowl and foot
final_elements.description: The sloped cup sides and small base curve.

final_elements.name: C-shaped handle
final_elements.description: The right-side handle attached near rim and lower cup.

final_elements.name: saucer keeper ellipse
final_elements.description: The darkened saucer edge and inner seat curve.

final_elements.name: warm tea surface
final_elements.description: The tan liquid oval inside the rim.

final_elements.name: steam wisps
final_elements.description: Three light vertical steam lines above the cup.

final_elements.name: red heart
final_elements.description: The small red heart centered on the cup front.

final_elements.name: warm rim stripe
final_elements.description: The thin warm stripe following the front rim.

final_elements.name: cup and saucer shadows
final_elements.description: The pale side shading, saucer tone, and cast shadow.

frames.visible_job: Places the saucer oval, cup rim oval, faint center line, and light slanted cup-side guides before any keeper lines.
Adds the cup rim keeper lines, cup bowl sides, small foot curve, and C-shaped handle as one readable construction move.
Darkens the saucer ellipse and adds the smaller inner curve under the cup.
Adds the warm tea oval and three light steam wisps while keeping the decorative heart absent.

frames.step_name: Draw the heart and rim stripe
frames.visible_job: Adds the red heart and warm rim stripe after the cup structure is already established.
Adds pale cup shading, blue-gray saucer shading, and a soft cast shadow while leaving the final line pass unfinished.

final_step.visible_job: Strengthens the rim, handle, saucer, steam, heart, and final colored-pencil accents without changing the pose.

rejection_checks: No adjacent frame should look unchanged at card size.
The heart must not appear before the heart-and-rim-stripe step.
The final image must keep the same cup, handle, saucer, steam, tea oval, and red heart as the step frames.
Do not reintroduce the rough v1 draft as public art.
